notes: Nemacolin Resort homepage alive; site is general resort marketing covering accommodations/dining/activities with no mention of Mystic Mountain ski area, trail counts, or difficulty breakdowns.

Site alive (end-of-season banner). Trail Maps page describes terrain for Beginners / Intermediate / Advanced / Park Riders but does not publish trail counts or difficulty percentages.
Domain nordicvalley.com is now occupied by a Korean sports-streaming site (Spotalk); not the Utah ski resort. Official site no longer resolves to ski resort content.
Site alive. Heli-skiing operator covering 300,000 acres of backcountry; no defined named runs or difficulty classifications (consistent with heli-ski model).

Site alive (Nordic / multi-use community trails nonprofit). Mentions '35+ miles of trails' and '750+ acres protected'; no alpine-style trail count or difficulty percentages.

Site alive (extensive conditions reports). Trail Maps page provides downhill and Nordic maps as images only; no published total trail count or difficulty percentages in text.
